auth-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and Spring Boot 3.3 target.
Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
Upgrade Spring Cloud version to 2023.0.6 for compatibility with the new Spring Boot version.
Replace the deprecated mysql-connector-java artifact with the new mysql-connector-j artifact.
auth-service/pom.xml.why_exists: The artifact mysql-connector-java is deprecated and removed in newer versions; using the old artifact may lead to build failures or runtime issues with newer MySQL drivers.

auth-service/src/main/java/com/example/a.general_idea: Replace traditional instanceof check and cast with Java 16+ pattern matching for instanceof.
auth-service/src/main/java/com/example/a.after: if (value instanceof String string) { validationErrors.put(key, string); }

auth-service/src/main/java/com/example/a.general_idea: Replace List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.
Update method signature to use HttpStatusCode instead of HttpStatus to align with Spring Boot 3.x API changes.
auth-service/src/main/java/com/example/a.why_exists: The handleMethodArgumentNotValid method in ResponseEntityExceptionHandler now expects HttpStatusCode instead of HttpStatus; using the old type causes a compile error due to signature mismatch.

auth-service/src/main/java/com/example/a.general_idea: Add import for the new HttpStatusCode class used in the updated method signature.
auth-service/src/main/java/com/example/a.why_exists: The code references HttpStatusCode which is not imported; without this import, the code fails to compile.
